prompt: Retrieve and compare candidates CAN-6843 and CAN-9843; report each name, interview date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either ID fails to resolve to exactly one record, stop and ask me to verify it before any update.

follow_up_turns.content: For Alex Nguyen — community liaison (CAN-6843) only, set the interview date to 2026-11-16. Leave CAN-9843 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for CAN-6843: set the interview date to 2026-12-20, not 2026-11-16. The other candidate must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first interview date.
Replace the superseded interview date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both interview date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected interview date as current and the first requested interview date as superseded.
If either explicit ID is unresolved or non-unique, ask for verification and do not execute an update.
